name: ~°•Herneval•°~
description:
Okay,so i just got a new hear me out,Herneval.

He's a character from the 2022 mexican stop motion series "Frankelda's book of spooks" and recently the new movie "I Am Frankelda" which is the first stop motion mexican film ever and it's amazing,i just saw it on cinemas a few hours ago.

He's the "Prince of spooks" or i don't know how do you call "sustos" in english.

Anyways i didn't found him attractive but idk, now he's just like a hear me out bc he has something,an I don't know what.

If you want to watch the series is on HBO Max,and even if the character speaks Spanish bc he's from Mexico (technically) I'll make this bot in english,then I'll release a Spanish ver.

He's kinda like an owl that's why the furry tag is on this.

Now,to the most important part, what's the story? Well,im this case you will take the role of the main character of the series,Frankelda. But with your oc.
creator: Matias Alex
